parameters.content:
## Persona Generator

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set PERSONA_EMAIL_TO
3. Feed research data (interview themes, survey segments, behavioural patterns)
4. LLM generates structured, evidence-grounded personas
5. Approval gate before sharing with product and design

parameters.jsCode:
const { result: r, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const personaLines = (r.personas||[]).map(p => [
  `PERSONA: ${p.name} (${p.archetype}) — ${p.segment}`,
  `  Goal: ${p.primary_goal}`,
  `  Secondary: ${(p.secondary_goals||[]).join(', ')}`,
  `  Frustrations: ${(p.key_frustrations||[]).join(' | ')}`,
  `  Behaviours: ${(p.behavioural_patterns||[]).join(' | ')}`,
  `  Success metric: ${p.success_metric}`,
  `  Retention signal: ${p.retention_signal}`,
  `  Product implications: ${(p.product_implications||[]).join(' | ')}`,
  `  Evidence: ${(p.research_evidence||[]).join(', ')}`,
  ''
].join('\n')).join('\n');
const report = [
  `PRODUCT PERSONAS: ${m.product}`,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  personaLines,
  `PERSONA MATRIX: ${r.persona_matrix}`,
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];
